task: ensure the manuscript is ready for submission

agents.A: Methodology Specialist (ORM construct-validity, BARS, formative measurement)
agents.B: Domain Theory Expert (typology theory, role theory, AI-in-research)
agents.C: Journal Editor / Prose (ORM register, hedging, claim ceiling)
agents.D: Comparative Methods Expert (cross-case sampling, inference under N=36)
agents.E: Submission-Process Auditor (compliance with ORM submission requirements)
agents.F: Data Integrity Auditor (manuscript stats vs. 06_analysis_tables/ ground truth)

do_not_change: All inferential statistics (chi2, Cramer V, p, kappa, CIs) — must match section6_analysis_output.json and intercoder_agreement_stats.json byte-for-byte
Title (just shipped at v39 after deliberate revision)
Pre-registered hypotheses (H1, H2, H3) and tie-breaker rules
Release tag v1.0.0-ORM-submission and Zenodo references
scope_includes: Submission-readiness gaps surfaced by reviewer agents
